title: Geelong, Victoria — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Geelong is a city in Victoria with a population of 282,809. Victoria’s second city with a revitalized waterfront, the Great Ocean Road gateway, and AFL heartland.
